summary: The paper proposes a novel inflationary scenario driven by a de Sitter spacetime where scalar perturbations are generated via second-order tensor effects (from quantum vacuum oscillations) rather than a scalar field (inflaton). The authors claim this naturally yields a nearly scale-invariant power spectrum and a mechanism to end inflation. However, the provided text only contains the abstract and references; the main body of the paper is entirely missing from the review bundle.
